---
title: 'catalog info'
---

## Synopsis

```bash
xorq catalog [OPTIONS] info
```

## Description

Display summary metadata about the catalog: repository path, current commit, configured git remotes, and counts of entries and aliases.

## Output

```
path:    /home/user/.local/share/xorq/annex-catalogs/my-catalog
commit:  a1b2c3d4e5f6
remotes: origin
entries: 5
aliases: 2
```

## Examples

```bash
xorq catalog --name my-catalog info
xorq catalog --path /data/catalogs/project info
```

## Related commands

- [catalog list](ls.qmd) — list entry names
- [catalog check](#) — validate catalog consistency

```bash
xorq catalog [OPTIONS] check
```

Validates that `catalog.yaml`, filesystem entries, metadata files, and alias symlinks are all consistent. Prints `OK` on success, raises an error on inconsistency.
